item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Jika hanya fokus pada kepentingan masyarakat, risiko diskriminasi dan penyalahgunaan kuasa akan meningkat.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that societal interests should take priority, with a caveat about protecting individual rights. By turn 3, Agent A adopts Agent B's rights-safeguard and abuse-of-power framing, then partially reasserts social priority in turn 5. Agent B remains consistently balance-oriented and increasingly critical of emphasizing societal priorities at the expense of individual rights.
